title: calophyllum aurantiacum
intro: Calophyllum aurantiacum, also known as the orange calophyllum, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a unique combination of triterpenoids and limonoids with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum aurantiacum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the seeds are often prepared as a paste or oil, which can be used in herbal preparations such as creams, ointments, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
